prompt: Create a polished anime-style fantasy illustration of two adult Chinese xianxia court beauties reclining closely together on a luxurious carved wooden bed in an ornate ancient palace bedroom. Both women have very long flowing glossy black hair, elaborate high updos with gold floral hairpins, dangling ornaments, earrings, and delicate necklaces; their faces are softly obscured by a smooth rectangular blur as if anonymized. They wear sheer, elegant hanfu-inspired night robes in deep royal purple and pale lavender pink, with gold embroidery, translucent draped sleeves, layered gauze, and a refined sensual fashion look rather than explicit nudity. Pose them seated and reclining side by side on white pillows and silk bedding, legs gracefully crossed and overlapping, bare feet visible, long hair spilling across the bed in sweeping black ribbons. The room should feel like a warm lantern-lit imperial boudoir with carved lattice railings, dark wooden screens, bedside cabinets, glowing paper lanterns, sheer white canopy curtains, soft golden sunlight from the side, floating dust motes, and curling violet incense-like wisps around them. Use a vertical composition, high-detail digital painting, glossy anime realism, delicate skin shading, ornate gold trim, cinematic warm lighting, shallow depth of field, luxurious romantic atmosphere, and rich purple-gold color harmony.
